{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Business Partners- Senior Manager HR",
  "description": "PTK Consulting Limited is an HR firm and one of the best HR outsourcing companies in Nigeria, PTK provides HR for small business and mid-sized companies experiencing growth. By outsourcing human resources to us, CEOs can focus on the core business while governance risk and compliance, organizational culture,employee experience and other HR services are fully taken care of.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Business Partners- Senior Manager HR
Job Location:&nbsp;Ogijo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client who are a business conglomerate is seeking to recruit an experinced HRBP in one of their subsidiaries who are into steel production.
	The ideal candidate must be strategic in carrying out his/her functions and must be able to support the business through robust HR initiatives.


Key Roles and Responsibilities


	Manage Labour Contractor: Should be able to manage all outsourced labour contractors, outsourced contract workers and monitor attendance.
	Employee Relations and Culture: Resolving conflicts, conducting disciplinary actions, and cultivating a positive workplace culture
	Compensation and Benefits: Administering payroll, health insurance, and other benefits programs.
	Performance Management: Supporting performance reviews and setting goals for employee development
	HR Strategy and Administration: Developing HR strategies aligned with company goals, managing HR systems, and reporting metrics



	Talent Acquisition and Management: Leading recruitment, interviewing, onboarding, and training efforts.
	Compliance and Risk Management: Ensuring adherence to local, state, and federal labor laws, and managing risk through policies
	Strategic Workforce Planning &amp; Optimization across functional departments.


Must Have Skills / Qualification


	B.Sc / Masters Degree will be added advantage
	7-10 years of progressive experince in HR
	Good communication skills
	Be strategic in thinking
	Manufacturing experince.


Salary
N500,000 - N600,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated Resume to:&nbsp;ptkconsultinglimited@yahoo.com&nbsp;using &quot;Human Resources Business Partner- Senior Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

  },

  },

Human Resources Business Partners- Senior Manager HR Job at PTK Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        PTK Consulting Limited is an HR firm and one of the best HR outsourcing companies in Nigeria, PTK provides HR for small business and mid-sized companies experiencing growth. By outsourcing human resources to us, CEOs can focus on the core business while governance risk and compliance, organizational culture,employee experience and other HR services are fully taken care of.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Business Partners- Senior Manager HR
Job Location: Ogijo, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client who are a business conglomerate is seeking to recruit an experinced HRBP in one of their subsidiaries who are into steel production.
	The ideal candidate must be strategic in carrying out his/her functions and must be able to support the business through robust HR initiatives.


Key Roles and Responsibilities


	Manage Labour Contractor: Should be able to manage all outsourced labour contractors, outsourced contract workers and monitor attendance.
	Employee Relations and Culture: Resolving conflicts, conducting disciplinary actions, and cultivating a positive workplace culture
	Compensation and Benefits: Administering payroll, health insurance, and other benefits programs.
	Performance Management: Supporting performance reviews and setting goals for employee development
	HR Strategy and Administration: Developing HR strategies aligned with company goals, managing HR systems, and reporting metrics



	Talent Acquisition and Management: Leading recruitment, interviewing, onboarding, and training efforts.
	Compliance and Risk Management: Ensuring adherence to local, state, and federal labor laws, and managing risk through policies
	Strategic Workforce Planning & Optimization across functional departments.


Must Have Skills / Qualification


	B.Sc / Masters Degree will be added advantage
	7-10 years of progressive experince in HR
	Good communication skills
	Be strategic in thinking
	Manufacturing experince.


Salary
N500,000 - N600,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated Resume to: [email protected] using "Human Resources Business Partner- Senior Manager" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Direct Sales Agent",
  "description": "ACE Recruiters Limited (RC: 1397156) commenced operations March 2017. We are a People and Business Management Consulting firm passionate about adding value. We offer services in the areas of Strategic Human Resource Consulting and we have the capacity to ensure returns on investment in the following areas: Outsourcing &ndash; Personnel, Sales &amp; Business Process,&nbsp; Human Resources Consulting,&nbsp;Training and Development,&nbsp;Sales Support &ndash; Market Intelligence, Promotion &amp; Activation.

With a strong drive to be one of the best in our areas of core competences, we pride ourselves as specialists in our chosen field of endeavour. We are driven by a sense of mutually beneficial relationships with our clients, striving to create high performance teams, and deliver agile operations that responds and drives the ever changing ways of doing business/working.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Direct Sales Agent

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Meeting or exceeding weekly, monthly, and yearly sales targets.
	Canvassing assigned territories to present company products to potential customers.
	Assisting management in identifying viable marketing and pricing strategies.
	Demonstrating product features to customers.
	Contacting leads and setting up appointments to present company products.
	Completing order forms and submitting them for processing.
	Attending trade shows and other industry-related events.
	Preparing sales proposals for potential buyers.
	Completing regular sales reports specifying the number of sales made.


Requirements


	OND / HND qualification
	Bachelor&#39;s degree in marketing, business administration or related field is advantageous.
	Proven sales experience.
	The ability to retain important information.
	Sound consultative selling skills.
	Excellent networking skills.
	Strong negotiation skills.
	Effective communication skills.
	Exceptional customer service skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 / Month.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-22",

  },

Direct Sales Agent Job at ACE Recruiters Limited




        
    

        
        ACE Recruiters Limited (RC: 1397156) commenced operations March 2017. We are a People and Business Management Consulting firm passionate about adding value. We offer services in the areas of Strategic Human Resource Consulting and we have the capacity to ensure returns on investment in the following areas: Outsourcing – Personnel, Sales & Business Process,  Human Resources Consulting, Training and Development, Sales Support – Market Intelligence, Promotion & Activation.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



With a strong drive to be one of the best in our areas of core competences, we pride ourselves as specialists in our chosen field of endeavour. We are driven by a sense of mutually beneficial relationships with our clients, striving to create high performance teams, and deliver agile operations that responds and drives the ever changing ways of doing business/working.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Direct Sales Agent

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Meeting or exceeding weekly, monthly, and yearly sales targets.
	Canvassing assigned territories to present company products to potential customers.
	Assisting management in identifying viable marketing and pricing strategies.
	Demonstrating product features to customers.
	Contacting leads and setting up appointments to present company products.
	Completing order forms and submitting them for processing.
	Attending trade shows and other industry-related events.
	Preparing sales proposals for potential buyers.
	Completing regular sales reports specifying the number of sales made.


Requirements


	OND / HND qualification
	Bachelor's degree in marketing, business administration or related field is advantageous.
	Proven sales experience.
	The ability to retain important information.
	Sound consultative selling skills.
	Excellent networking skills.
	Strong negotiation skills.
	Effective communication skills.
	Exceptional customer service skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N300,000 / Month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Ensure proper filing and organization of all fleet-related documents.
	Coordinate communication between drivers, management, and other departments.

	Support daily fleet operations and administrative processes.
	Track and follow up on pending tasks, invoices, and requests.

	2&ndash;3 years of administrative experience (preferably in fleet, logistics, or operations).
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and Outlook.
	Experience with digital filing and record-keeping systems.
	Basic knowledge of vehicle documentation and compliance requirements.

Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook).
	Ability to manage spreadsheets, logs, and shared files effectively.
	Familiarity with digital record-keeping systems.

	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Ability to meet deadlines and follow up consistently.
	Good time management and record-keeping skills.


Interpersonal Skills:


	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to interact professionally with drivers, vendors, and internal teams.
	High level of integrity, discretion, and confidentiality.
	Team-oriented with a proactive approach to work.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Fleet Officer Job at Steam Broadcasting and Communications Limited




        
    

        
        Steam Broadcasting and Communications Limited, a leading radio station, is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly organized Fleet Officer to provide administrative and clerical support to the Fleet Department. Reporting to the Head of Fleet, the successful candidate will ensure that all fleet records, documentation, and communications are accurate, up-to-date, and well maintained.
	The role also serves as a key link between drivers, management, Accounts, and other departments to ensure smooth daily vehicle operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain and update fleet records, documentation, and reports.
	Ensure proper filing and organization of all fleet-related documents.
	Coordinate communication between drivers, management, and other departments.
	Monitor vehicle documentation such as insurance, licenses, and renewals.
	Support daily fleet operations and administrative processes.
	Track and follow up on pending tasks, invoices, and requests.


Qualifications


	HND or B.Sc. in Office Administration, Business Management, Logistics, or a related field.
	2–3 years of administrative experience (preferably in fleet, logistics, or operations).
	Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and Outlook.
	Experience with digital filing and record-keeping systems.
	Basic knowledge of vehicle documentation and compliance requirements.


Required Skills & Competencies:
Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, Outlook).
	Ability to manage spreadsheets, logs, and shared files effectively.

Organizational Skills:


	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

Interpersonal Skills:


	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Ability to interact professionally with drivers, vendors, and internal teams.
	High level of integrity, discretion, and confidentiality.
	Team-oriented with a proactive approach to work.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Junior Accountant",
  "description": "Recruit with Adenike is a recruitment and talent solutions brand committed to connecting high-performing professionals with forward-thinking organizations across diverse industries. From entry-level roles to executive placements, we help businesses attract, engage, and retain the right talent to fuel growth and success. Our approach is efficient, personalized, and rooted in a deep understanding of people and business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly motivated Junior Accountant to join our finance team.
	The ideal candidate will support day-to-day financial operations, ensure accuracy in financial records, and assist with reporting and compliance in a fast-paced fintech environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in preparing financial statements and reports
	Maintain accurate records of financial transactions
	Reconcile bank statements and company accounts
	Process invoices, payments, and expense reports
	Support month-end and year-end closing processes
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal policies
	Assist with audits and provide necessary documentation
	Monitor financial data and identify discrepancies


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	1&ndash;2 years of relevant accounting experience
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Good communication and organizational skills


Preferred Qualification:


	ICAN certification or ACA (in view or completed) is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Transport allowance
	HMO
	Pension
	Career growth opportunities
	Exposure to a dynamic fintech environment
	Collaborative and innovative work culture.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitmentforce.africa@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Junior Accountant Job at Recruit with Adenike




        
    

        
        Recruit with Adenike is a recruitment and talent solutions brand committed to connecting high-performing professionals with forward-thinking organizations across diverse industries. From entry-level roles to executive placements, we help businesses attract, engage, and retain the right talent to fuel growth and success. Our approach is efficient, personalized, and rooted in a deep understanding of people and business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accountant
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly motivated Junior Accountant to join our finance team.
	The ideal candidate will support day-to-day financial operations, ensure accuracy in financial records, and assist with reporting and compliance in a fast-paced fintech environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in preparing financial statements and reports
	Maintain accurate records of financial transactions
	Reconcile bank statements and company accounts
	Process invoices, payments, and expense reports
	Support month-end and year-end closing processes
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations and internal policies
	Assist with audits and provide necessary documentation
	Monitor financial data and identify discrepancies


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	1–2 years of relevant accounting experience
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Good communication and organizational skills


Preferred Qualification:


	ICAN certification or ACA (in view or completed) is an added advantage.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary
	Transport allowance
	HMO
	Pension
	Career growth opportunities
	Exposure to a dynamic fintech environment
	Collaborative and innovative work culture.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR and Admin Manager",
  "description": "First Excelsia Professional Services Limited&nbsp;-&nbsp;Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR and Admin Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Human Resources and Administration

Job Description


	Our client is seeking a HR and Administrative Manager who will be responsible for managing the company&rsquo;s human resources and administrative functions to support operational efficiency and organizational growth.
	The role involves overseeing recruitment, employee relations, performance management, HR policy implementation, and office administration.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies, procedures, and best practices.
	Manage the full employee lifecycle, including recruitment, onboarding, development, and exit processes.
	Coordinate recruitment activities for technical, engineering, and administrative staff.
	Manage employee records and ensure proper HR documentation and compliance.
	Source and recruit qualified candidates for engineering and support roles.
	Coordinate interviews, candidate assessments, and hiring processes.
	Develop strategies to attract and retain high-performing employees.
	Implement performance management systems and employee evaluation processes.
	Promote a positive work environment and company culture.
	Oversee office administration and operational support services.
	Manage company facilities, office equipment, and administrative processes.
	Coordinate travel, logistics, and office support services.
	Ensure efficient workplace systems and administrative controls
	Develop HR systems that support company growth


Person Specification


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	5&ndash;8 years of HR experience, preferably in engineering, construction, or technical service companies.
	Proven experience managing both HR and administrative functions.
	Proven experience in recruitment, employee relations, and HR policy development.
	Strong leadership and people management skills
	Strong organizational and administrative skills
	Ability to manage multiple priorities in a growing organization
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional HR certification is seriously considered.


Monthly Net Remuneration
N250,000 - N500,000 / Month.

HR and Admin Manager Job at First Excelsia Professional Services Limited




        
    

        
        First Excelsia Professional Services Limited - Our client is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR and Admin Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Human Resources and Administration

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is seeking a HR and Administrative Manager who will be responsible for managing the company’s human resources and administrative functions to support operational efficiency and organizational growth.
	The role involves overseeing recruitment, employee relations, performance management, HR policy implementation, and office administration.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies, procedures, and best practices.
	Manage the full employee lifecycle, including recruitment, onboarding, development, and exit processes.
	Coordinate recruitment activities for technical, engineering, and administrative staff.
	Manage employee records and ensure proper HR documentation and compliance.
	Source and recruit qualified candidates for engineering and support roles.
	Coordinate interviews, candidate assessments, and hiring processes.
	Develop strategies to attract and retain high-performing employees.
	Implement performance management systems and employee evaluation processes.
	Promote a positive work environment and company culture.
	Oversee office administration and operational support services.
	Manage company facilities, office equipment, and administrative processes.
	Coordinate travel, logistics, and office support services.
	Ensure efficient workplace systems and administrative controls
	Develop HR systems that support company growth


Person Specification


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	5–8 years of HR experience, preferably in engineering, construction, or technical service companies.
	Proven experience managing both HR and administrative functions.
	Proven experience in recruitment, employee relations, and HR policy development.
	Strong leadership and people management skills
	Strong organizational and administrative skills
	Ability to manage multiple priorities in a growing organization
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional HR certification is seriously considered.


Monthly Net Remuneration
N250,000 - N500,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “HR and Admin Manager” as the subject of the mail.
